sub_modules.fp_unpack: Extracts sign, exponent, fraction, and operand classification bits.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles zeros, infinities, NaNs, invalid operations, and direct special-case results.
sub_modules.fp_align: Builds significands with guard bits, orders operands by magnitude, and right-shifts the smaller operand with sticky-bit preservation.
sub_modules.fp_addsub: Performs aligned significand addition or subtraction and emits the raw signed magnitude result.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the raw significand, applies IEEE-style rounding modes used by the testbench, packs the result, and generates exception flags.
